name: Spec Analysis mode - design doc to test plan
prompt: 이 설계문서를 분석해서 테스트 플랜을 만들어줘. 설계문서 경로: /Users/kangnam/.claude/skills/agent-create/qa-engineer-workspace/iteration-1/eval-2/test-design-doc.md
expected_output: refs/spec-analysis.md를 참조하고, 6단계 워크플로우를 따르며, 구조화된 test-plan.md를 출력

assertions.text: Agent reads the spec-analysis.md reference file before starting analysis
Agent identifies which of the 6 required sections are present in the design doc
Agent cross-references the design doc against the actual codebase using Grep or Glob
Output contains the structured test plan format: Summary table, Test Cases by section, Gaps, Cross-Reference
Each test case has type (unit/integration/e2e) AND priority (P0/P1/P2) assigned
Agent generates at least 5 test cases total from the design doc
